task: I need to send a quick note to a supervisor about missing part of a shift because of a personal conflict. Can you help me put together a brief message that covers the basics and is easy to send?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a brief, easy-to-send version:

Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I wanted to let you know I’ll need to miss part of my shift on [date] because of a personal conflict. I’m letting you know as early as I can so you can plan accordingly. Please let me know if you need anything else from me.

If you want, I can make it even shorter or more casual.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and straight, not too much. I can just swap in the name and date and send it.
